category_sources: source_facts.description says osm2pgsql is an OpenStreetMap data to PostgreSQL converter; official osm2pgsql.org describes it as an ETL tool for OpenStreetMap data into PostgreSQL/PostGIS.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide osm2pgsql; official osm2pgsql.org uses the same project name.
docs_sources: Official osm2pgsql.org documentation page links installation instructions, manual v2, tutorials, man pages, FAQ, and releases.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/osm2pgsql-dev/osm2pgsql; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says OpenStreetMap to PostgreSQL converter; official osm2pgsql.org describes PostgreSQL/PostGIS processing and specialized ETL for OSM data.
